expectations.text: Identifies that journals need to be processed as the most likely fix (not re-syncing or other guesses)
expectations.evidence: Step 3 runs 'clams journals process' as the primary fix. Explicitly states this is 'the most likely fix' and references the #1 cause of empty reports.

expectations.text: Does not re-sync connections when the user already said they synced yesterday
expectations.evidence: No sync command in the workflow. Goes straight to diagnostics and journals process.

expectations.text: Checks for quarantined events as a secondary diagnostic
Creates a business expense tag and applies it to events
expectations.evidence: Step 6 creates tag, Step 8 applies it to multiple events.

expectations.text: Re-processes journals after applying tags so reports reflect the changes
expectations.evidence: Step 9: clams journals process after tagging.

expectations.text: The workflow ends with the user seeing a working balance sheet
expectations.evidence: Step 5 shows balance-sheet after fix, Step 11 shows it again after tagging.
